brand.taglineLong: From cut to packing slip, all in one place.

login.title: Sign in
login.sub: Welcome back. Pick a sign-in method to continue.
login.devBypassBanner: Dev-bypass auth is active. Sign-in inputs are ignored — click "Sign in" to enter as the configured dev user.
login.magicCta: Get a sign-in link by email

magic.title: Email sign-in link
magic.sub: No password — we'll email you a sign-in link.
magic.confirmEmail: Confirm your email to finish signing in.
magic.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to sign in.

errors.popupBlocked: Pop-up was blocked. Allow pop-ups and try again.
errors.generic: Could not sign in. Try again.
errors.magicCompleteFailed: That link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.comingSoon: Password recovery is coming soon. Reach out to support to reset your password.

accessDenied.title: You're not invited
accessDenied.body: This account isn't on the invite list yet. Ask your team admin to send you an invite, then sign in again.

acceptInvite.title: You're invited
acceptInvite.body: You've been invited to join {companyName} as {roleName}.

errors.invalid: This invite is no longer valid.
errors.alreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.sub: Here's your operation overview for today, {month} {day}.

pipeline.title: Production pipeline
pipeline.sub: Where your pieces are right now
pipeline.footer: On average a piece takes 7.2 days from order to delivery.

needsAction.title: Needs your attention
needsAction.sub: {count, plural, =0 {No pending items} one {# pending item} other {# pending items}}

since.hours: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
since.days: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.sub: {count, plural, =0 {No actions yet} one {Latest action} other {Latest # actions}}

list.title: Orders
list.sub: Track every order from every channel in one place.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.body: Create your first order or wait for a channel webhook to drop one in.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this order? This cannot be undone.

title.newSub: Register a manual order across any channel.
title.editSub: Adjust price, date or external code.

form.noVariations: No variations available for this ad.

validation.pricePositive: Price must be zero or greater

toasts.deleteBlocked: This order already shipped — stock has moved.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to orders.

list.title: Import
list.sub: Drop a PDF or CSV and let the AI extract orders. You confirm every field before they hit the catalog.

dropzone.title: Drop the file here
dropzone.body: Drag a payment receipt or a sales CSV. We will parse it and let you review the rows before saving.
dropzone.acceptedTypes: PDF or CSV — up to 5 MB
dropzone.errorType: Only PDF and CSV files are accepted.

preview.title: Parsed orders
preview.editHint: Click any cell to edit before saving.
preview.empty: No rows left to import. Go back and pick another file.

commit.title: Confirm import
commit.body: Save {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}}? Each row will become a real order in the catalog.
commit.errorSomeFailed: Some rows could not be saved.

errors.generic: Some rows could not be imported.
errors.parseFailed: We could not parse this file. Try another one.
errors.parseEmpty: The parser did not find any orders in this file.

toasts.parseSuccess: Found {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} to review.
toasts.commitSuccess: {count, plural, one {# order imported} other {# orders imported}}.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to import orders.

list.title: Clients
list.sub: Directory of clients across all channels.

empty.title: No clients yet
empty.body: Track every buyer in one place — start by adding your first client.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this client? This cannot be undone.

list.title: Ads
list.sub: Manage product listings across ecommerces and social channels.

empty.title: No ads yet
empty.body: Publish your first ad to start tracking listings across channels.

actions.confirmDelete: This ad will be removed. This cannot be undone.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to ads.

title.newSub: Publish a listing on an ecommerce or social channel

hints.externalIdOptional: Optional — leave blank if the channel doesn't assign a code.

list.title: Products
list.sub: Combinations of tech spec + print, organized by size and color.

empty.title: No products yet
empty.body: Create your first product to start linking specs and prints.

variations.title: Variations
variations.body: Each cell becomes a SKU. Drop a combination to remove it.
variations.noPreview: Pick at least one size and one color to preview SKUs.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this product? This cannot be undone.

placeholders.name: e.g. Cropped Oversized
placeholders.searchSpec: Search spec by code or name…
placeholders.searchPrint: Search print by code or name…

validation.variationsRequired: Pick at least one size and one color
validation.duplicatePair: A product already exists for this spec + print combination.

variationsTab.lowStockNote: Variations in red are below the minimum stock (4 units).

ordersTab.emptyBody: This product hasn't been sold yet.

adsTab.emptyBody: Create an ad to start selling this product.

help.title: Products — tech spec + print, in colors and sizes
help.body: A product is born by joining a tech spec (fabric and fit) with a print. Each color-and-size combination becomes a variation (SKU) — the unit that stock, ads and production actually move.

list.title: Tech specs
list.sub: Production recipes: fabric, grammage, ribana and CMT cost.

empty.title: No specs yet
empty.body: Specs describe how a product is made. Create your first to start cutting and sewing.

actions.noResults: No specs match the current filters.

validation.ribanaPctRequired: Inform the % weight of the ribana when “uses ribana” is on.
validation.duplicateCode: This code is already in use.
validation.linkedProducts: Cannot delete: products are using this spec.

list.title: Prints
list.sub: Catalog of applied artwork — DTF, silk, sublimation.

empty.title: No prints yet
empty.body: Add your first artwork to start linking it to products.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this print? This cannot be undone.

helpers.imageUrl: Paste the public URL of the final artwork.

help.title: Prints — the catalog of artwork applied to garments
help.body: Each print holds the artwork and the application method — DTF, silk or sublimation — with its print size. It is what gets laid out on the sheet and what each piece's label shows.

usedBy.title: Products using this print
usedBy.empty: No product uses this print yet.

sides.label: Sides
sides.hint: Sides apply to every color — set whether the art goes on the front, the back, or both. Then upload one PNG per side for each color.

variations.title: Color variations & PNG files
variations.name: Color name
variations.pendingPngs: {count, plural, one {# pending PNG} other {# pending PNGs}}
variations.empty: No color variations yet — add one to upload artwork.
variations.allColorsUsed: All ink colors are in use.
variations.noPalette: Set ink colors in Settings › Catalog first.

list.title: Cutting
list.sub: Plan and record cutting batches against your fabric rolls.
list.noResults: No cutting orders matched your search.

empty.title: No cutting orders yet
empty.body: Plan a batch against a fabric roll to start tracking cutting.

actions.confirmDelete: The cutting order will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to cutting orders.

title.newSub: Plan a new batch against a fabric roll

hints.cutAtOptional: Leave blank to keep the order pending.

validation.rollsDiffer: Rib roll must be different from body roll

list.sub: Track shipments sent to and received from sewing workshops.

empty.title: No shipments yet
empty.body: Send your first batch of cut pieces to a sewing workshop.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to shipments.

receive.title: Receive shipment
receive.description: Record how many pieces came back per size.

title.newSub: Send cut pieces to a sewing workshop

validation.atLeastOneSize: At least one size must have a piece

list.title: Workshops
list.sub: Sewing workshop directory and metrics.

empty.title: No workshops yet
empty.body: Register your first sewing partner to start tracking shipments.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

placeholders.address: e.g. R. das Palmeiras, 120 — São Paulo, SP

validation.duplicateName: A workshop with this name already exists

list.title: Rolls
list.sub: Every roll received and how much remains. Balance is decremented at each cut.

empty.title: No rolls registered yet
empty.body: Register your first incoming roll to start tracking fabric balance.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by supplier, color or fabric type…

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
actions.confirmDeleteBody: The roll will be permanently removed.

detail.consumersEmpty: No cut has been registered against this roll yet.

validation.initialWeightPositive: Initial weight must be greater than zero
validation.currentExceedsInitial: Current weight cannot exceed initial weight
validation.pricePositive: Price must be zero or greater
validation.deletionBlocked: Cannot delete — this roll is referenced by a cutting order.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to fabric rolls.

list.title: Stock
list.sub: Finished-piece inventory by SKU.

empty.title: No stock registered yet
empty.body: Entries appear when a sewing shipment is received or you record a manual adjustment.

adjust.title: Record movement

preview.lowWarning: After this exit the SKU will be in shortage.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be greater than zero

adjust.noRecent: No movements recorded yet for this SKU.

movements.title: Movements
movements.sub: Every entry and exit, ordered from newest.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to stock.

list.title: Print stock
list.sub: Printed-stamp inventory by design and color.

empty.title: No printed stamps registered yet
empty.body: Entries appear when you record a print run or a manual adjustment.

adjust.title: Record movement
adjust.sub: Add or remove printed stamps for a design and color.

toasts.insufficient: Insufficient print stock for this exit.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be greater than zero

movements.title: Movements
movements.sub: Every print-stock entry and exit, newest first.

drawer.title: Movement history
drawer.empty: This design / color hasn't moved yet.

list.title: Supplies
list.sub: Consumable supplies (insumos) and their on-hand balance.

empty.title: No supplies registered yet
empty.body: Add a supply to the catalog, then record purchases and consumption to track its on-hand balance.

actions.confirmDelete: This supply will be permanently removed. Supplies with stock movements cannot be deleted.

hints.minStock: On-hand at or below this flags low stock. Leave empty to disable.

adjust.title: Record movement
adjust.subtitle: Pick a supply and a movement type.

list.title: Reports
list.sub: Cross-reference sales, production, inventory and cost data.

list.sub: Configure your account, team, integrations, and how you want to be notified.

company.title: Company identity
company.sub: How your company appears for the team and on documents.

helpers.subdomainImmutable: Cannot be changed in this version.

dangerZone.sub: Actions that affect all of the company's data.

delete.title: Delete company
delete.body: Removes all data after 30 days. This action is irreversible.

profile.title: Your profile

helpers.roleImmutable: Ask an admin to change your role.

empty.title: Coming soon
empty.body: This section will launch in a future release.

integrations.body: Connect Orion to your shop, marketplace, and accounting tools.

notifications.title: Notifications — coming soon

hero.body: You're part of the early group — billing isn't enabled yet. When it is, we'll let you know well in advance.

usage.title: Team usage
usage.sub: Members with access to your account
usage.remaining: {count, plural, one {# seat left} other {# seats left}} on this account.
usage.limitReached: Limit reached — get in touch to unlock more seats.

grid.title: Usage
grid.sub: Live usage measured against your plan limits
grid.limitReached: Limit reached on your current plan.

integrations.syncDaysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

stockAlerts.title: Stock alerts
stockAlerts.sub: Set the on-hand quantity at or below which a SKU is flagged as low stock.

helpers.threshold: A variation is considered low when its on-hand quantity is at or below this number. Per-variation overrides take precedence.

stockAlerts.errorToast: Could not save stock alert settings.

validation.invalid: Enter a whole number of 0 or more.

catalogConfig.title: Catalog
catalogConfig.sub: Colors, sizes, garment types and trims used across the catalog.
catalogConfig.loadError: Could not load the catalog configuration.
catalogConfig.saveError: Could not save the catalog configuration.
catalogConfig.footnote: Changes apply to new products. Existing products keep what was already saved.

productColors.title: Fabric colors
productColors.sub: Material colors available when creating a product. Each product picks from these.

printColors.title: Print colors
printColors.sub: Ink colors available for the applied artwork — paired with each material color on the product.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.sub: Size grid that can be enabled on each product's variations.
sizes.empty: No sizes — add at least one.

fabricTypes.title: Fabric types
fabricTypes.sub: Available when receiving rolls in Stock › Fabric and on the tech sheet.

garmentTypes.title: Garment types
garmentTypes.sub: Tech-sheet models. Each has an icon and a SKU prefix.

aviamentos.title: Trims
aviamentos.sub: Items that can be added to a tech sheet's cost.

techniques.title: Print techniques
techniques.sub: Print methods available in Catalog › Prints.

validation.needLabel: Give every garment type a name.
validation.needSku: Each garment type needs a valid SKU prefix.

thresholds.title: Low-stock alerts
thresholds.sub: Orion highlights the item and warns you when the balance crosses the limit set here.
thresholds.footnote: Turning a tier off silences its reorder alerts across Orion — useful for items your shop doesn't keep in stock.

summary.off: No alert — this tier is not tracked.
summary.pct: Warns below {value}% of the initial balance · {scope}

list.title: Roles & permissions
list.sub: What each role can do in the system.

admin.name: Admin
admin.desc: Full access — team, billing and integrations.

manager.name: Manager
manager.desc: Runs sales, catalog, production and stock.

operator.name: Operator
operator.desc: Focused on day-to-day production and stock.

matrix.title: Permissions matrix
matrix.sub: What each role can do in the system.

editor.subtitle: Name the role and choose what it can read or edit.

fields.name: Name
fields.codeHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores. Cannot be changed later.

actions.confirmDelete: This role will be permanently removed. Members must be reassigned first.

list.title: Audit log
list.sub: Every change to your data, with who, when, and what.

empty.title: No audit entries match
empty.body: Try clearing the filters or expanding the date range.

home.title: Welcome to Orion
home.subtitle: Pick a section from the sidebar to get started.

page.title: Item
page.sub: Link each imported order item to the right internal product variation (SKU). The print follows from the product.

help.title: De/Para — order item → internal variation (SKU)
help.body: Each order item arrives from the marketplace with the ad's variation (colour/size from the title). Here you link it to the internal variation (SKU) of the right product — that's where stock, print and production come from. Anything the system can't yet recognise stays pending and only moves to Separation once linked.

progress.awaiting: {count, plural, one {item awaiting link} other {items awaiting link}}
progress.withSuggestion: {count, plural, one {# suggestion ready} other {# suggestions ready}}
progress.allLinked: All items are linked — orders can move on to Separation.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search ad, ad SKU or internal SKU…

pending.title: No pending items
pending.desc: Every order item is already linked to an internal SKU.

toast.acceptedAll: {count, plural, one {# suggestion accepted} other {# suggestions accepted}}
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have permission to view order mapping.

list.title: Production
list.sub: Pack orders into a batch, print labels and dispatch.
list.empty: No batches yet. Create one from selected orders.

create.title: New batch
create.hint: Other lines of the same order are added automatically.

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this batch? Orders will be unlinked.

toast.noShippingLabels: No shipping labels available for this batch.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to batches.

list.title: Separation
list.sub: Turn each linked order into a labelled piece, print 100×50mm labels, then scan to check pieces out.
list.empty: No orders to separate. Adjust the filters above.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to separation.

bar.selectedCount: {orders, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} · {pieces, plural, one {# piece} other {# pieces}}

row.noPieces: No pieces yet — print labels to materialise them.

scan.placeholder: Scan a label's QR / tracking code…

toast.notPrinted: Print the label for {code} before scanning

etiqueta.title: Separation labels — 100×50mm
etiqueta.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# label} other {# labels}} (1 per piece)
etiqueta.print: Print {count, plural, one {# label} other {# labels}}

howto.title: How to use:
howto.step1: Print and stick 1 label on each piece during separation / pressing.
howto.step2: At check-out, scan each label's QR. When every piece of an order is scanned, release the shipping label.
howto.chrome: In Chrome: paper 100×50mm, margins None, scale 100%.

toast.printed: {count, plural, one {# label} other {# labels}} sent to print
toast.noPieces: This order has no pieces to label.

overview.title: Platform
overview.desc: Organizations, people and usage across the whole Orion base.

revenue.title: Recurring revenue
revenue.soon: Revenue and MRR tracking are coming soon.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.soon: Trial and billing signals are coming soon.

activity.title: Platform activity
activity.soon: A cross-tenant audit feed is coming soon.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.desc: Every Orion customer is an organization. Manage team, usage and access.
organizations.createdDesc: An invite was sent to {email} to claim the workspace.

sheet.title: New organization
sheet.sub: Create a workspace and invite its owner to take it over.
sheet.name: Organization name
sheet.subdomainHint: Lowercase, unique. Used to identify the tenant.
sheet.ownerEmailHint: We'll send an invite to set the password and claim the workspace.

billing.title: Billing
billing.soon: Invoices and billing are coming soon.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.sub: Actions that affect the organization's access
danger.pauseDesc: Suspends the team's access without deleting data.
danger.deleteDesc: Removes all data after 30 days. Irreversible.

users.title: Console
users.desc: The Orion team with access to platform administration — not organization members.
users.hint: Looking for an organization's members? They live inside each organization, under Team.

plans.title: Plans
plans.desc: The Orion plan catalog and its limits.
plans.ribbon: Read-only catalog. Plan editing and billing aren't wired yet.
plans.empty: No plans in the catalog yet.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: Health of the connectors that feed every organization.
integrations.ribbon: Coming soon · illustrative data. Integration health telemetry isn't wired yet.

impersonation.error: Could not start the support session.
impersonation.confirmDesc: You'll enter the {name} workspace with full access to the organization's data.
impersonation.bullet1: This is an invasive action and is logged in the platform audit.
impersonation.bullet2: The team will see a banner indicating an Orion support session.
impersonation.bullet3: End the session as soon as you're done.
